about.title: A different kind of med spa
about.body: Glo de Vie Med Spa was built on a simple belief: that everyone deserves expert aesthetic care in a setting that feels personal, not clinical. Our boutique North Hills studio offers a warm, intimate environment where every treatment is customized to you — no cookie-cutter plans, no rushed appointments.
bullets: Licensed medical professionals on every treatment

finalCta.title: Ready to discover your best skin?
finalCta.body: Schedule a consultation and let our team build a personalized plan around your goals.
